p.c: function[T0: MetricSpace, T1: MetricSpace, T3: MetricSpace, T4: MetricSpace](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T3 -> T4) { (forall(x2: T0, x3: T0) { x0(x2).distance(x0(x3)) <= x2.distance(x3) } and forall(x4: T3, x5: T3) { x1(x4).distance(x1(x5)) <= x4.distance(x5) }) = pair_map_components_nonexpansive[T0, T3, T1, T4](x0, x1) }[M, P, N, Q](f, g)
